title: Kadhal Azhivathilai Song Lyrics Kadhal Azhivathilai
stanzas: <div>Kadhal Azhivathilai (kadhal deepavali) Song Lyrics Kadhal Azhivathilai

Kadhal azhivathillai
kadhal alai pol oaivathillai
kadhal vaa endraal
varuvathillai
kadhal po endral
povathillai

oru mura nenachuvittaa
marakkavum mudiyaadhu.
neruppu vachi suttaa kooda
kadhal nenju vegaathu.

solladi solladi en kadhaliye
ne sonnadhu sonnadhuthaan
thaangalaiye (2)

peththavanga oththukonda
neeyum naanum kadhalichom
maththavanga opputhal
thandhaa neeyum naanum
sandhichom

nirbanthamae senjaalum
nichchayame mudithaalum
anai pota vellam nikkume
thada pota ullam nikkuma
thada pota kadhal
ullam nikkumaa

edhirpukugal vandhaa kooda
edhir neechal adukkanumdi
dhesam vittu kadathunaalun
thunintha kadhal jeikkumadi

sattam potu thaduthaalum
thittam potu vadhaithaalum
oor koadi edhirthaalum
udambu renda pirichaalum

udhadu venaa maari pesum
ullam mattum maaraadhu
kadhal ullam mattum
maaraadhu.

oru mura nenachuvittaa
marakkavum mudiyaadhu.
neruppu vachi suttaa kooda
kadhal nenju vegaathu.

solladi solladi en kadhaliye
ne sonnadhu sonnadhuthaan
thaangalaiye (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Azhivathilai?

The song explores the theme of eternal love and the emotions associated with it.

Who composed the music for Kadhal Azhivathilai?

The music was composed by T Rajendar.

What role does the song play in the movie Kadhal Azhivathilai?

The song underscores the romantic and emotional aspects of the film's narrative.

Who is the singer of Kadhal Azhivathilai?

The song is sung by the legendary SPB.

When was the movie Kadhal Azhivathilai released?

The movie was released in 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadhal Azhivathilai from the movie Kadhal Azhivathilai is a beautiful melody that delves into the depths of everlasting love. Sung by SPB, the song's lyrics by T Rajendar express the unwavering nature of true love. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. The music complements the emotional weight of the lyrics, creating a timeless classic that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kadhal Azhivathilai from the movie Kadhal Azhivathilai. This soulful melody, brought to life by SPB's enchanting voice and T Rajendar's heartfelt composition, captures the essence of undying love. Dive into the emotions and let the music take you on a nostalgic journey.
stanzaMeanings: Love never ends, like waves that never stop. If you call love, it won't come; if you tell it to go, it won't leave.
Once you think about it, it stays in your heart, no matter what anyone does.
Love, love, it never ends, like waves that never stop.
Love is like a festival of lights, bringing warmth to the heart.
Once you think about it, you can't forget it. Even if you burn it with fire, love won't leave the heart.
Do you know that your life belongs to me? Don't you understand that love never ends?
Tell me, tell me, my love, what you said is true, I can't bear it.
Love is like a festival of lights, bringing warmth to the heart.
Our parents agreed, and we fell in love. Others' approval brought us together.
When eyes meet, love blossoms.
When hearts think of each other, affection grows.
Some people only value status and money.
They separate children by putting love aside.
Even if the news spreads, even if ten hands stop it.
Even if it's forced, even if it's decided, water stops with a dam, but can love be stopped?
Love is like a festival of lights, bringing warmth to the heart.
Love crosses caste, religion, and language.
Love stands beyond family opposition.
Girls are like dolls controlled by parents.
It's not true that lovers hate me because you said so.
Even if there are obstacles, you must swim against them. Even if taken away, determined love will win.
Even if laws stop it, even if plans destroy it, even if a million oppose, even if bodies are separated.
Even if lips stop speaking, the heart won't change, love won't change.
Love is like a festival of lights, bringing warmth to the heart.
Once you think about it, you can't forget it. Even if you burn it with fire, love won't leave the heart.
Do you know that your life belongs to me? Don't you understand that love never ends?
Tell me, tell me, my love, what you said is true, I can't bear it.
